first_run.rationale: The scores are identical (9/10), and the reasoning in both evaluations is substantively the same. Both versions highlight the candidate's extensive full-stack experience, specific tech stack alignment, and background in AI. The concerns raised are also very similar. The minor differences in wording and the specific secondary languages mentioned as a concern (Kotlin/Java vs. DLang) are well within the expected range of run-to-run variation and are not linked to the change in university.
